# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM nginx:latest AS web-server
COPY . /usr/share/nginx/html

FROM node:14 as api-server
WORKDIR /usr/src/app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . .
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["node", "server.js"]

FROM postgres:latest as database
ENV POSTGRES_USER=myuser \
    POSTGRES_PASSWORD=mypassword \
    POSTGRES_DB=mydb
EXPOSE 5432

FROM redis:alpine as redis
EXPOSE 6379

FROM alpine AS final-stage
COPY --from=web-server /usr/share/nginx/html /usr/share/nginx/html
COPY --from=api-server /usr/src/app /usr/src/app
COPY --from=database /var/lib/postgresql/data /var/lib/postgresql/data
COPY --from=redis /data /data

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

CMD ["sh", "-c", "nginx & postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/data & redis-server /usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf & node /usr/src/app/server.js"]
